allow: Bash(vai issue create --title "Version detail page — missing data, broken timestamps, empty diffs" --body 'Multiple issues on the version detail page after the id fix::*)
Bash(psql postgres://vai:vai@localhost:5432/vai -c "DELETE FROM workspaces WHERE repo_id = ''444225da-9a16-4946-8644-a7afded105f5'' AND status = ''Created''")
Bash(psql postgres://vai:vai@localhost:5432/vai -c "UPDATE issues SET status = ''open'' WHERE repo_id = ''444225da-9a16-4946-8644-a7afded105f5'' AND status = ''in_progress'' RETURNING title")

Bash(psql postgres://vai:vai@localhost:5432/vai -c "UPDATE issues SET status = ''closed'', resolution = ''wontfix'' WHERE repo_id = ''444225da-9a16-4946-8644-a7afded105f5'' AND title LIKE ''%related issues linking%''")
Bash(psql postgres://vai:vai@localhost:5432/vai -c "SELECT id, event_type FROM events WHERE repo_id = ''444225da-9a16-4946-8644-a7afded105f5'' AND id = 2")

Bash(psql postgres://vai:vai@localhost:5432/vai -c "SELECT id, event_type FROM events WHERE repo_id = ''444225da-9a16-4946-8644-a7afded105f5'' AND event_type = ''MergeCompleted'' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5")
Bash(psql postgres://vai:vai@localhost:5432/vai -c "DELETE FROM workspaces WHERE repo_id = ''444225da-9a16-4946-8644-a7afded105f5'' AND status IN \(''Created'', ''Active''\)")

Bash(cd ~/development/git-for-ai __NEW_LINE_2f29108a30c4a3e6__ gh issue create --title "Add input validation middleware for all API endpoints" --label "enhancement,priority:high" --body "XX-Security Issue 1. Add axum middleware or extractor-level validation enforcing: string length limits \(issue titles 500 chars, bodies 50KB, intents 1000 chars, file paths 1000 chars, labels 100 chars each max 20 per issue\), file content limits \(max 10MB per file, 50MB per request, 100 files per upload\), path traversal prevention \(reject .., absolute paths, null bytes\), JSON payload size limits \(50MB migration endpoint, 10MB all others\), query param validation \(pagination max 1000 per page\). Return 400 with descriptive errors. Add tests.")

Bash(tail -1 __NEW_LINE_2f29108a30c4a3e6__ gh issue create --title "Add last_used_at tracking to API keys" --label "enhancement,priority:medium" --body "XX-Security Issue 4. Update the api_keys table to add last_used_at TIMESTAMPTZ column. Update the auth middleware to set last_used_at on each successful authentication \(debounce to once per minute to avoid write amplification\). Include last_used_at in the list keys API response. Add OpenAPI annotations.")

Bash(tail -1 __NEW_LINE_2f29108a30c4a3e6__ gh issue create --title "Make CORS origins configurable" --label "enhancement,priority:high" --body "XX-Security Issue 5. Add cors_origins configuration to server config \(server.toml or environment variable VAI_CORS_ORIGINS\). Accept a comma-separated list of allowed origins. Default to * in development \(when no config is set\). In production, require explicit origins. Update the CorsLayer in the axum router to use the configured origins instead of Any. Add tests.")

Bash(tail -1 __NEW_LINE_2f29108a30c4a3e6__ gh issue create --title "Add structured security logging" --label "enhancement,priority:medium" --body "XX-Security Issue 7. Add structured logging \(using tracing\) for security-relevant events: successful and failed auth attempts \(IP, key prefix, result\), permission denials \(user, repo, required permission\), data mutations \(issue create/close, workspace submit/discard, escalation resolve — actor, repo, resource ID\), admin actions \(org/member/collaborator changes\). Use consistent field names across all log entries.")

Bash(tail -1 __NEW_LINE_2f29108a30c4a3e6__ gh issue create --title "Add cargo audit to CI" --label "enhancement,priority:medium" --body "XX-Security Issue 8. Add cargo audit to the CI pipeline \(or create one if it does not exist\). Install cargo-audit and run it during CI. Fail the build on critical and high severity vulnerabilities. Add a cargo audit step to the GitHub Actions workflow. Also add a note in CLAUDE.md that developers should run cargo audit periodically.")

Bash(tail -1 __NEW_LINE_2f29108a30c4a3e6__ gh issue create --title "Document production deployment security checklist" --label "enhancement,priority:medium" --body "XX-Security Issue 9. Create docs/deployment-security.md documenting: TLS setup with nginx or caddy as reverse proxy, required environment variables \(DATABASE_URL, VAI_S3_*, VAI_ADMIN_KEY, VAI_CORS_ORIGINS\), recommended Postgres settings \(ssl=require, connection limits\), S3 bucket policy \(private, no public access\), firewall rules \(only expose port 443\), log rotation configuration, backup strategy for Postgres and S3.")

Bash(tail -1 __NEW_LINE_2f29108a30c4a3e6__ gh issue create --title "Add agent rate limiting and file upload validation" --label "enhancement,priority:high" --body "XX-Security Issue 10. Agents can upload files, create issues, and submit workspaces autonomously. Add specific protections: validate uploaded file paths \(no .., no absolute paths, no null bytes — may already exist but verify\), enforce file size limits on upload \(10MB per file\), enforce tarball size limit on upload-snapshot \(100MB\), rate limit workspace creation per API key \(50/hour\), rate limit issue creation per API key \(100/hour\). Validate tarball contents — reject symlinks and absolute paths. Add tests.")

Bash(tail -1 __NEW_LINE_2e408aa005207ee4__ gh issue create --title "Set up GitHub Actions CI pipeline" --label "enhancement,priority:high" --body "PRD 17 Issue 3. Create .github/workflows/ci.yml with three jobs: \(1\) test-cli: cargo test + cargo clippy + cargo audit, \(2\) test-full: cargo test --features full with a Postgres service container, \(3\) build-image: on main branch only, build and push Docker image to ghcr.io. Use dtolnay/rust-toolchain for Rust setup. Use docker/build-push-action for image builds.")

Bash(tail -1 __NEW_LINE_2e408aa005207ee4__ gh issue create --title "Create Docker Compose for self-hosted deployment" --label "enhancement,priority:high" --body "PRD 17 Issue 4. Create infra/docker-compose.yml with four services: vai-server \(ghcr.io/jjordy/vai:latest\), dashboard \(ghcr.io/jjordy/vai-dashboard:latest\), postgres \(postgres:16-alpine with named volume\), minio \(minio/minio with named volume and console on port 9001\). Environment variables configured for local connectivity between services. Include a README in infra/ explaining how to start it.")

Bash(tail -1 __NEW_LINE_2e408aa005207ee4__ gh issue create --title "Add health check endpoint with subsystem status" --label "enhancement,priority:high" --body "PRD 17 Issue 5. Expand GET /health to return detailed subsystem status: database reachable \(run SELECT 1 on Postgres pool\), S3 reachable \(list a test prefix\), server uptime, version. Return 200 if all healthy, 503 if any subsystem is down. Include subsystem details in response body as JSON. Add OpenAPI annotations.")

Bash(tail -1 __NEW_LINE_2e408aa005207ee4__ gh issue create --title "Create Terraform config for Cloudflare R2 bucket" --label "enhancement,priority:medium" --body "PRD 17 Issue 6. Create infra/terraform/ directory with main.tf, variables.tf, outputs.tf. Use the cloudflare provider to create an R2 bucket. Variables: cloudflare_api_token, cloudflare_account_id, r2_bucket_name \(default vai-prod\), r2_location \(default ENAM\). Outputs: r2_endpoint, bucket_name. Add .terraform and terraform.tfvars to .gitignore. Include a README explaining how to run terraform init and apply.")

Bash(tail -1 __NEW_LINE_2e408aa005207ee4__ gh issue create --title "Create fly.toml and deployment documentation" --label "enhancement,priority:medium" --body "PRD 17 Issue 7. Create infra/fly.toml with app config: primary_region iad, build from infra/Dockerfile.server, internal_port 7865, force_https, auto_stop_machines false, min_machines_running 1, health check on /health. Create infra/DEPLOY.md documenting: first-time setup \(fly auth login, fly launch, fly postgres create, fly postgres attach, set secrets, fly deploy\), subsequent deploys, rollback procedure \(fly releases rollback\), and how to run the migration.")
